titleStmt.title: SII 22.295B: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 295B. (A.R. No. 295-B of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJARĀJA I—4th YEAR (A.D. 988-989)

summary.p: This is another damaged record found in the same place. It is dated in the 4th year probably of the same king, and registers a grant of 15 kaḻañju of gold for a perpetual lamp in the temple, made by a donor whose name is lost. The amount is stated to have been invested with the Ūrār of Kaitaṇḍalam in Dāmar-nāḍu.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nmaṟku yāṇṭu 4Āvatu tāmarkkoṭṭattu vallanāṭṭut tirumāl peṟṟu Āḻvārkku viḻupparaiyanāṭṭu
Amutinukkut tāmarkkoṭṭattu tāmarnāṭṭuk kaitaṇṭalattu Ūrār taṉmakaṭṭaḷaiyāl poṉ patiṉaiṅkaḻañcu poṉkoṇṭu nicatam Uḻakku ney yeṇ
nāḻiyoṭokkum Uḻakkāl nicatam Uḻakku neyyeṇṇai Āḷvār koyilil tiruvuṇṇāḻikai koṇṭuvantu Aṭṭuvatākavum Iney yeṇṇai taṇṭavantārkaḷu
The next line is badly damaged.
Digital edition of SII 22.295B by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
